request_id.description: Unique identifier for the approval request.

proposer.description: The component or module that initiated the request (e.g., gemini_mas).

action_type.description: High-level category of the proposed action.

proposed_payload.description: The serialized data representing the exact operation (e.g., shell command, file path/content).

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp when the request automatically expires if no response is received.
